page_metadata.biotools__summary: Java GUI that enables the user to graphically call differentially expressed genes. For read mapping it relies on bowtie and for the differntial expression analysis it builds on an R backbone running DESeq and edgeR.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Java GUI that enables the user to graphically call differentially expressed genes. For read mapping it relies on bowtie and for the differntial expression analysis it builds on an R backbone running DESeq and edgeR.
